title: In memory, May 2014
summary: Catherine Elizabeth Atkinson, 72 Catherine Elizabeth Atkinson passed away April 6 at Keen Eye Care Assisted Living Home in Soldotna, Alaska. Mrs. Atkinson was born Feb. 12, 1942. She enjoyed fishing in the summers with friends visiting from out of state. She was a devout member and minister of Our Lady of Per...

title: From a Former Smoker
